lore.hotdognalds.hotdog: A food that can be cooked on a grill. Can be thrown.
lore.hotdognalds.condiment_dispenser: Dispenses condiments onto hotdogs. Can be dyed.
lore.hotdognalds.cup: A cup that can be filled at a soda fountain.
lore.hotdognalds.diner_hat: A decorative hat that can be worn.
lore.hotdognalds.grill: A block that cooks hotdogs and hotdog buns. Can be toggled on/off by clicking the red light.
lore.hotdognalds.crate: A decorative/utility block that has a single inventory slot.
lore.hotdognalds.creative_crate: A decorative/utility block that can provide an endless supply of an item. Can only be stocked in creative mode.
lore.hotdognalds.soda_fountain: Dispenses drinks into cups. Has a random variant when placed.
lore.hotdognalds.counter: A decorative counter block that shapes similarly to stairs.
